scripts.dev:web: npm run sync && npm run --prefix packages/web dev
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run sync && npm run --prefix packages/desktop dev
scripts.build:web: npm run sync && npm run --prefix packages/web build
scripts.build:desktop: npm run sync && npm run --prefix packages/desktop build
scripts.package: npm run sync && npm run --prefix packages/desktop package
scripts.package:win: npm run sync && npm run --prefix packages/desktop package:win
scripts.package:mac: npm run sync && npm run --prefix packages/desktop package:mac
scripts.package:linux: npm run sync && npm run --prefix packages/desktop package:linux
